flow: odds decimal prices -> implied probabilities -> no-vig market
Poisson 0-6 score matrix with scoreline adjustment

factors.method: Only indirectly through Elo/recent goals against, no standalone defense model
venue displayed but no lambda coefficient
manual inputs can include absences; confirmed XI not modeled structurally
knockout xG damping and draw boost
lineup freshness shown, confirmed XI not in scoring model
host flag only; no venue coefficient

summary.limitation: Strict completed-match evaluation uses only archived pre-match snapshots. Current local snapshots do not cover completed matches, so replay metrics are separated as diagnostic-only and must not be treated as out-of-sample backtest.

matches.other_adjustment: confederation + long-term team market strength if available
matches.notes: weather: not implemented; venue: displayed but not weighted; lineup/injury: partial via team_inputs; stage: group motivation possible
